actionUnits.condition: Scene MonoBehaviour_0 is Fire (guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) with exact serialized settings: isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, maxHitInterval=2, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo=<fileID:1849464941111748095>. Object has BoxCollider (enabled) and implements IWaterInteractable. To cover the 'turning off' path, an external water system must repeatedly call Fire.WaterHit(Vector3) within maxHitInterval until cumulative currentHitTime >= totalHitTime so that isOn toggles to false and UpdateFireState(true) runs (stopping particles and notifying neighbors/FireController). No public parameterless methods exist on Fire, so this Trigger relies on collision-driven invocation of IWaterInteractable.WaterHit.

Scene MonoBehaviour_0 is Fire (guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) with exact serialized settings. To cover the 'neighbor-induced ignition' path, ensure onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold (2) via at least two neighbor Fire objects within maxNeighborDistance=4 (one preferably lower by >= minNeighborDownDistance=3 to exercise downMultiplier=2). Awake will set timeToOn randomly between [40,60], so after shouldTurnOn is set by CheckNeighborState(), Update should set isOn=true once timeToOn elapses and call UpdateFireState(true). No public parameterless methods exist to invoke directly; this Trigger represents waiting time for automatic state change after neighbor setup.
